BARN DESTROYED, TREES UPROOTED, DAMAGE TO HOUSE AND SHOP LIFT REMOVED.

STORM SURVEY CONFIRMED EF1 TORNADO. A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN A WOODED AREA BEFORE MOVING ACROSS A PROPERTY. A 60X80 FOOT GARAGE WAS FLATTENED. A 53 FOOT SEMI TRAILER WAS LIFTED AND ROTATED AND SET DOWN ABOUT 150 FEET AWAY. THERE WAS DAMAGE TO TWO BARNS AND WINDOWS WERE BLOWN OUT OF A HOME. THE TORNADO CAUSED TREE DAMAGE. THE MAX PATH WIDTH WAS 35 YARDS WITH A MAXIMUM ESTIMATED WIND SPEED OF 100 MPH.
